clips.title: The City
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, cinematic grade. A sweeping establishing shot of a glittering city skyline at dusk, skyscrapers stretching to the horizon, warm windows and cool sky, a rooftop in the foreground. Evening. A person in a coat stands small on the foreground rooftop taking in the view, establishing the place. Warm city lights, cool dusk sky, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Homestead
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, pastoral grade. A wide establishing shot of a lone farmhouse amid vast rolling green fields under a big sky, a dirt track leading to it. Late afternoon, warm. A person in rustic clothes stands small by the farmhouse, establishing the setting. Warm golden light, immense open land, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Grand
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. A wide establishing shot of a grand illuminated hotel facade at night, glowing marquee, columns, a sweeping entrance and steps. Night, warm lights. A person in evening attire stands small at the foot of the steps, establishing the location. Warm facade light, cool night, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Harbor
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, warm coastal grade. A wide establishing shot of a colorful coastal fishing village seen from a hillside, terracotta roofs, boats in the harbor, blue sea beyond. Morning, bright. A person in light clothes stands small on the hillside path, establishing the place. Warm morning light, sparkling water, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Road
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, epic grade. A wide establishing shot of a long empty desert highway stretching dead straight toward distant mountains, scrub and big sky. Midday, harsh clear light. A person in casual clothes stands small beside a parked car on the shoulder, establishing the vast setting. Hard warm light, endless perspective, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Keep
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, historical, dramatic grade. A wide establishing shot of an ancient stone castle perched on a green hill, ramparts and towers, a winding road up to the gate, moody sky. Overcast day. A person in a traveler's cloak stands small on the road below, establishing the location. Cool dramatic light, sweeping scale, 24mm, establishing shot. Deep focus, subtle grain, 24fps.
